message:
feat(tui): add dashboard widget rendering to home view (ft-3hbv9)

Wire DashboardModel into render_home_view() with 4 dashboard panels:
- Cost tracker: per-provider spending, totals, budget bars, alerts
- Rate limits: per-provider status with clear time estimates
- Backpressure: tier indicator, queue utilization, paused pane count
- Quota gate: evaluation count and block rate

Layout adapts to terminal width: 2x2 grid for wide terminals (>=60 cols),
single column for narrow, and summary-line-only fallback for tiny screens.

Adds 7 new unit tests covering wide/narrow/tiny terminals, dashboard with
error footer, and direct panel rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
